_vrk() {
    local cur prev words cword
    _init_completion || return

    if [[ $cword -eq 1 ]]; then
        COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "bar foo" -- "$cur"))
        return
    fi

    local tool="${words[1]}"
    case "$tool" in
        bar)
            COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--verbose --quiet -q" -- "$cur"))
            ;;
        foo)
            COMPREPLY=($(compgen -W "--json -j --count -n" -- "$cur"))
            ;;
    esac
}
complete -F _vrk vrk
